sizing_rule.note: Fractional Kelly (41.67% of optimal f) applied to each market system's optimal f$ to reduce leverage and correlation risk across multiple simultaneous positions. Formula: New f$ = Optimal f$ ÷ 1.4167

source_rule_text: Position size is calculated by multiplying the optimal f value for each market system by a fractional f of 0.4167 to reduce leverage and avoid margin calls while trading multiple correlated systems.
